components.name: A11yPlaygroundTheme
components.description: Configuration object passed to ThemeProvider to define the active design system theme.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Omit or set this to undefined to allow 'Hide All'/'Show All' in parent to take precedence for cases where we want the default expand behaviour

components.name: Alert
components.description: The primary call to action component. Displays messages of different types (success, warning, error, info, description) with optional icons and action links.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: A component that displays a visual representation of a user or entity.

components.name: Badge
components.description: A visual indicator for notifications or status, displayed as a badge overlay.

components.name: BoxContainer
components.description: Test ID overrides for sub-elements within BoxContainer.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Color set for the left and right fade effect on overflowing breadcrumbs.

components.name: Button
components.description: The style type of the button. Values: "default" | "secondary" | "light" | "link"

components.name: ButtonWithIcon
components.description: The primary call to action component with an icon. Extends `ButtonProps` with an icon slot that can be positioned on the left or right of the label.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: CSS class name for custom styling.

components.name: Card
components.description: Props for the Card component - elevated content container. Renders a styled box with a white background and rounded corners. Inherits all `HTMLDivElement` attributes.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Props for the Checkbox component - binary selection control. Renders a styled checkbox with optional indeterminate state. Inherits all standard `HTMLInputElement` attributes.

components.name: CountdownTimer
components.description: Pixel-based sticky offset for desktop and tablet viewports.

components.name: DataTable
components.description: Props for the DataTable component - tabular data display with selection. DataTable organises row data into columns and supports sortable headers, optional row selection, loading states, sticky headers, and empty states. Use it when users need to scan, compare, and act on structured data.

components.name: DateInput
components.description: Props for the DateInput component - single date picker with calendar overlay. Displays a text input that opens an inline calendar for selecting a single date. Controlled via a `"YYYY-MM-DD"` string value. Supports optional confirmation buttons, disabled and read-only modes, and focus/blur callbacks.

components.name: DateNavigator
components.description: Displays the current date with left/right arrow navigation and an optional calendar dropdown. Supports day and week view modes.

components.name: DateRangeInput
components.description: Props for the DateRangeInput component - date range picker with calendar overlay. Displays two linked text inputs (start and end) that open a shared calendar for selecting a date range. Controlled via `"YYYY-MM-DD"` string values. Supports week, month, and fixed-day range variants in addition to the default free-range mode.

components.name: Divider
components.description: A component that renders a horizontal line. Supports both flex and grid layouts, with configurable thickness, color, and line style.

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Props for the Drawer component - slide-in side panel. Renders a panel that slides in from the side of the screen, overlaying the page content. Toggled via the `show` prop and dismissed via the close button or overlay click callbacks.

components.name: ErrorDisplay
components.description: Interval (in seconds) for announcing remaining time via screen readers

components.name: ESignature
components.description: Props for the ESignature component, a canvas-based electronic signature input that allows users to draw and submit their signature.

components.name: FeedbackRating
components.description: Props for the FeedbackRating component - star-rating survey widget. Renders an optional banner image, a description prompt, a row of star buttons, and a submit button. Controlled via the `rating` prop.

components.name: FileDownload
components.description: Represents a single file item available for download.

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: Props for an individual file item displayed in the upload list.

components.name: Filter
components.description: Base props shared by all Filter variants. Displays widgets under collapsible panels to filter data results.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Any custom attributes you would like to pass to the link

components.name: Form
components.description: Determines whether a label addon renders as an inline tooltip or a popover overlay.

components.name: FullscreenImageCarousel
components.description: An overlay that displays images in a carousel and offers the ability to zoom into the current image.

components.name: HistogramSlider
components.description: Describes a single histogram bin with its frequency count and lower boundary value.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Props for the IconButton component - icon-only button. Renders a square button containing only an icon child. Extends all `HTMLButtonElement` attributes. Choose the style type based on hierarchy and the size type based on available space.

components.name: ImageButton
components.description: Props for the ImageButton component - image thumbnail button. Renders a clickable image tile with selected and error visual states. Extends all `HTMLButtonElement` attributes.

components.name: Input
components.description: Visual style variant for the input field. `"bordered"` renders a full border; `"no-border"` removes it.

components.name: InputGroup
components.description: The type of addon attached to the input group.

components.name: InputMultiSelect
components.description: A multi-select dropdown input that allows users to pick multiple options from a list.

components.name: InputNestedMultiSelect
components.description: A multi-select dropdown that supports hierarchical (nested) option categories up to 3 levels deep.

components.name: InputNestedSelect
components.description: Options props for nested select, replacing the flat options list with a hierarchical one.

components.name: InputRangeSelect
components.description: Options props for the range select, providing separate from/to option lists and load states.

components.name: InputRangeSlider
components.description: Base props shared between all slider variants.

components.name: InputSelect
components.description: Options and loading state props shared across select components.

components.name: InputSlider
components.description: Props for the InputSlider component - single-thumb numeric slider. Renders a horizontal slider with a single thumb for selecting a numeric value within a given range. Supports step intervals, track colour customisation, and value labels. For a dual-thumb range slider use `InputRangeSlider`.

components.name: Layout
components.description: The type of display style. Values: "flex" | "flex-column" | "grid"

components.name: LinkList
components.description: Props for the LinkList component, which renders a grouped list of navigational anchor links with optional eager or lazy loading of items.

components.name: Markup
components.description: Sets styling for commonly used HTML markup elements such as `<strong>` or `<a>`.

components.name: MaskedInput
components.description: Configuration for masking behaviour applied to an input field.

components.name: Masthead
components.description: A mandatory banner displayed at the top of .gov.sg digital service pages.

components.name: Menu
components.description: A popover-based dropdown menu component, commonly used with Avatar and Navbar. Extends PopoverV2TriggerProps (except `popoverContent`).

components.name: Modal
components.description: A window or pop up that displays over other page content and provides information or actions.

components.name: ModalV2
components.description: The styled card container within a ModalV2, wrapping the modal's visual surface.

components.name: Navbar
components.description: A standard navigation item rendered as a link, optionally with sub-menu items.

components.name: NotificationBanner
components.description: A component that remains sticky at the top of the page and provides the user with important notifications or notices.

components.name: OtpInput
components.description: A component to handle the entry of the one-time password (OTP) for multi-factored authentication methods.

components.name: Overlay
components.description: This stylesheet is to manipulate the <body>. We only add once

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Props for the Pagination component - page navigation control. Renders page number buttons and optional first/last navigation, with an optional page-size dropdown. Requires `totalItems` and `activePage` to be controlled by the parent.

components.name: PhoneNumberInput
components.description: A country entry used to populate the country-code dropdown.

components.name: Pill
components.description: Props for the Pill component - compact label badge. Renders a small pill-shaped tag with a configurable display style (solid fill or outline) and color scheme. Inherits all `HTMLDivElement` attributes.

components.name: PopoverV2
components.description: Props for the presentational Popover component that displays content in an overlay anchored to a trigger element.

components.name: PredictiveTextInput
components.description: Props for the PredictiveTextInput component, an async autocomplete input that fetches and displays matching suggestions as the user types.

components.name: ProgressIndicator
components.description: Props for the ProgressIndicator component - step progress tracker. Renders a horizontal row of step labels with the current step highlighted. Supports a custom display extractor for non-string step items.

components.name: RadioButton
components.description: A field that allows a user to select from a predefined set of mutually exclusive options, shown with a graphical circle indicator when active.

components.name: SelectHistogram
components.description: Subset of HistogramSlider props passed to the embedded histogram slider.

components.name: Sidenav
components.description: Shared base props for all Sidenav sub-components.

components.name: SingpassButton
components.description: The call to action for Singpass login, following the official Singpass button guidelines.

components.name: SmartAppBanner
components.description: Props for the SmartAppBanner component - mobile app download prompt. Renders a banner that prompts users to download the mobile app. Supports optional slide-down animation and a dismiss callback.

components.name: Tab
components.description: Used to organise content into multiple panes. Users can toggle between the different tabs to view different categories of information.

components.name: Tag
components.description: A static or interactive element that is used to communicate selections, statuses and categories.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Props for the Textarea component, a multi-line text entry field extending standard HTML textarea attributes.

components.name: TextList
components.description: The content of the list.

components.name: Timeline
components.description: Represents a single step or item within a Timeline.

components.name: Timepicker
components.description: Props for the Timepicker component, a time entry field supporting dial-based selection in 12-hour or 24-hour formats.

components.name: TimeRangePicker
components.description: Represents a time range with separate start and end time strings. Format depends on the `format` prop of the picker (`"hh:mm"` for 24 hr, `"hh:mmA"` for 12 hr).

components.name: TimeSlotBar
components.description: Resets the scroll position to the initialScrollTime if provided

components.name: TimeSlotBarWeek
components.description: Props for the TimeSlotBarWeek component - week-view time slot calendar. Renders a week calendar with per-day `TimeSlotBar` columns and an optional navigation header. Extends `CommonCalendarProps` for min/max date and locale settings.

components.name: TimeSlotWeekView
components.description: Props for the TimeSlotWeekView component - week-view availability grid. Renders a calendar week grid that overlays time slot availability on each day. Unlike `TimeSlotBarWeek`, slots are optional and the component focuses on date selection. Extends `CommonCalendarProps`.

components.name: Timetable
components.description: Style attributes for customizing the appearance of a timetable cell.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Configuration for the action button rendered within a Toast.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Props for the Toggle component - checkbox/radio selection control. Renders a styled toggle button that acts as a checkbox (allows deselection) or radio button (no deselection). The `type` prop controls behaviour and indicator icon.

components.name: Typography
components.description: Props for headings, body text, and other typographic elements.

components.name: UneditableSection
components.description: Props for a single uneditable item within UneditableSection.

components.name: UnitNumber
components.description: Props for the UnitNumberInput component, a specialised input for Singapore-style floor and unit number entry (e.g. "#12-34").

components.name: V2_BaseTheme
components.description: for color customisation, can specify subset of set
